title: Survival Displays
description: Create display models directly in survival without mods and resource packs
body:
![Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4496d385c6d60762d0bd20cfefc7ed671923d267_0.webp)

**Survival Displays** is a tool that allows you to create and edit item, block and text displays directly in survival. 
- No third-party programs, no mods, no resource packs, and no creative mode! 
- Multiplayer support
- All decorations created with Survival Displays will remain fully functional even after deleting the datapack.

To turn the Breeze rod into a tool, equip it in your hand and click the "Get Wand" button in the chat.

#   🎥 Watch some Videos
The lower = the newer
